summary: Advance notice of next regular scheduled maintenance day

updates.details: Advance notice of scheduled maintenance day on Tues 14th April 2026. Please plan your work to minimise disruption.

summary: Old (VIO7) JASMIN Cloud is being decommissioned on 14/04/26

updates.details: All tenants should have access to the new cloud. All machines on the old cloud will be switched off 14/04/26
Both scratch volumes (/work/scratch-pw4,5) are at risk while we investigate an issue with them.
Both scratch volumes are now accessible again.
Intermittent interruptions to all services due to a general networking issue. Team investigating.
The issue is now stable, LOTUS is back online, but a few nodes still drained.
A few LOTUS nodes became unavailable over the weekend but the networking issue has now been resolved.
CEDA and JASMIN services running at risk over the Easter holiday period.
Interactive node gpuhost001 will be rebooted at 12pm to resolve stuck processes. Please save your work beforehand.
